parsed.production_notes: Initial scenes are human-recorded. The split-screen features an AI-generated avatar with smooth, uncanny features and static posture. The human character's voice and lip-sync in the split-screen section appear AI-dubbed, lacking perfect synchronization.

characters.appearance: Mid-20s female, slim build, fair complexion, dark brown hair. Facial features are expressive.
characters.demeanor: Shifts from stressed and frustrated to enthusiastic and engaged.

characters.appearance: Young female avatar, fair complexion, red hair tied back, large brown eyes. Features are smooth and slightly uncanny.
characters.demeanor: Friendly, encouraging, static posture with hand resting on chin.

scenes.setting: Home office, daytime, white desk, laptop, green tumbler.

panels.panel_visual_description: High-angle shot of Character A sitting at a white desk, looking at a laptop. She appears stressed and covers her face with her hands. A green tumbler sits next to the laptop. A ceiling fan is visible above.

scenes.visual_description: A security-camera style shot of a woman struggling at her desk. Text overlays display the time and her spoken words.
scenes.audio_transcript:

Unknown speaker says: okay no worries take your time

panels.panel_visual_description: Close-up of Character A speaking directly to the camera. She is in a brightly lit room with a ceiling fan in the background. She later holds up a smartphone displaying a woman's face.

scenes.visual_description: A talking-head shot of the woman explaining her situation to the camera. She holds up her phone to show the app she is using. Captions overlay the bottom of the screen.

scenes.setting: Split screen. Left: abstract studio background. Right: Home office.

panels.panel_visual_description: Close-up of Character B resting her chin on her hand, smiling. She maintains a mostly static pose. The background is a soft, blurred gradient.
Close-up of Character A speaking to the camera. She is in her home office with a ceiling fan visible in the background.

scenes.visual_description: A vertical split-screen showing the AI avatar on the left and the human user on the right. They are having a conversation. Dynamic text overlays and icons appear over both panels to highlight corrections and dialogue.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character B says: What are you doing?
Character A says: I am working. I have many work today.
Character B says: Do you mean: "I have a lot of work today"?
Character A says: Yes, I have a lot of work today and my brain not working.
Character B says: Do you mean: "my brain isn't working"?
Character A says: Yes, I have a lot of work and my brain isn't working.
Character B says: That's perfect! Well done, Anna!
Character A says: I want to speak in English everyday but lesson is expensive!
Character B says: Why don't you speak to an AI tutor?
Character A says: I'm not sure about an AI tutor. I want someone who can help correct my mistakes.
Character B says: Like I did! My name is Loora and I am an AI tutor! Nice to meet you, Anna!
Character A says: You're an AI tutor? What? No way!
Character B says: Download the Loora app and talk to me everyday and I'll help correct your mistakes!
Character A says: Amazing. I'll add it to my daily routine today!
